newsfeed.title: Community
newsfeed.composerHint: Share an update with your community…
newsfeed.emptyNetwork: Follow people to see their updates here. Tap 👥 People to find them.
newsfeed.emptyAll: No posts yet. Be the first to share an update!
newsfeed.gateMemberBody: Share your progress, cheer each other on, and grow your network with people working toward the same goals.
newsfeed.gateSignInBody: Sign in to share updates, react, and follow people on the same journey.

post.reportedAck: Thanks — we'll review this and it's hidden from your feed.

composerScreen.askHint: Describe the habit or problem you're working on. Peers who've solved it can answer — and attach a habit you adopt in one tap.
composerScreen.placeholderAsk: e.g. How do you keep standing water from coming back after the rains?
composerScreen.placeholderPost: Share a win, ask for support, or cheer someone on…

detail.emptyAsk: No answers yet. Be the first to share what worked.
detail.attachPlaceholder: Habit that worked (e.g. Cover water containers daily)
detail.attachToggleA11y: Attach a habit to your answer
detail.adoptedBody: “{{habit}}” is now a daily habit of yours. Find it on your Today.
detail.adoptedBodyProject: “{{habit}}” is now a daily habit of yours, powering {{project}}. Find it on your Today.

emptyCategory: No posts in this area yet.

consent.title: Welcome to the community
consent.body: A quick agreement before you join in.
rules: Be kind and supportive — we're all building habits together.
No harassment, hate speech, threats, or explicit content.
Report anything that breaks these rules — we act within 24 hours.
Breaking the rules can get your content removed and your access revoked.
consent.age: I am 17 years of age or older

report.title: Report
report.sub: What’s wrong? We act on reports within 24 hours.

console.title: Moderation
console.subtitle: Open reports — act within 24 hours.
console.banConfirmBody: They will no longer be able to post, comment, or message. This can be undone in Firebase.

founding.title: Founding members only
founding.body: Levellio’s community is invite-only right now. Enter your founding code to join the movement.
founding.invalid: That code isn’t valid. Check it and try again.

inviteGate.title: You’re almost in
inviteGate.body: The community is invite-only during the beta. Enter your founding code to unlock the feed and projects.
